name: chat
description: Generate conversational responses using Cohere's language models. Supports multi-turn dialogue, tool use for agentic workflows, document grounding with citations, and structured JSON output with schema validation.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model ID to use for generation.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: Array of message objects with 'role' (system/user/assistant/tool) and 'content'.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description: Whether to stream the response. Set to false for non-streaming.

parameters.name: max_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the response.

parameters.name: tools
parameters.description: Array of tool definitions the model may call during generation.

parameters.name: documents
parameters.description: Array of documents for grounding responses with citations.

parameters.name: response_format
parameters.description: Specify output format as 'text' or 'json_object' with an optional JSON schema.

parameters.name: safety_mode
parameters.description: Content safety level: CONTEXTUAL, STRICT, or OFF.

messages.content: Explain quantum computing in simple terms.

content.text: Quantum computing uses quantum bits (qubits) that can exist in multiple states simultaneously, unlike classical bits which are either 0 or 1.
